arguments.Description: "Implement the Aylık Namaz Vakitleri (Monthly Prayer Times) tool detail screen with a gorgeous, high-fidelity responsive vertical table, styling today's row with premium gold/green border highlights, and loading the 30-day cached prayer dataset from the repository."
arguments.Instruction: "Add aylik namaz vakitleri state variables, add trigger to load monthly times inside initState, insert namaz-vakitleri-aylik case to switch statement, and append all the helper methods and widget builders for the monthly prayer times screen."
arguments.toolSummary: "Modify tool_detail_screen.dart to implement case for monthly prayer times with beautiful table layout"
